rules.name: cut_work
rules.teacher_rule: Cut work is identified by an irregular/scallop/step inside border that is stitched first and then cut along the shaped edge. Do not require net lines to call cut work.

rules.name: net_work
rules.teacher_rule: Net work is mainly used when the design has a drop/back-drop area with vertical, hanging, or jali line filling. Do not call every line pattern net work.

rules.name: rangoli_work
rules.teacher_rule: Rangoli work has kolam/rangoli-style diamond or geometric motifs with repeated loop/dot borders.

rules.name: normal_work
rules.teacher_rule: Normal work has smooth/regular embroidery borders and floral/motif filling without cut-work edge, net/drop filling, or rangoli geometry.

rules.name: neck_and_work_are_separate
rules.teacher_rule: Name the neck shape and the work type separately: U-shaped neck + cut work, pot neck + net work, drop neck + normal work, etc.
